summary: HTS (Hedera Token Service) and PWA Feature Testing - All tests passed. Backend: 22/22 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI components verified working.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing tokenized escrow e437e80a-39db-4368-a672-dcc93c8f1ad6
context_for_next_testing_agent: HTS and PWA features fully tested. Token 0.0.10422489 exists with 800/1000 supply (200 transferred to seller). PWA manifest, service worker, and icons all accessible. Dashboard has 'Tokenized Escrow' nav button in Security & Identity section.
